title: coupon — published macros
description: No published macros. The coupon module operates purely through service classes (CouponRedeemer / CouponValidator / CouponIssuer / CodeGenerator / ClawbackHandler) invoked from other modules' actions. There is no per-request coupon context that would justify a Request macro — a coupon is applied at explicit call sites, not implicitly from the request.
namespace_note: No macros; documented for symmetry with the module family.
rationale: Referrals ships Request::activeReferralProgram / Request::inboundReferral macros because there IS a request-boundary concept — the referral cookie carries context across requests. Coupons have no equivalent — the code is submitted at the invoice-creation call site, not carried across requests.
The invoice/membership module's CreateInvoiceAction passes coupon references explicitly via CouponRedeemer::redeem(coupon: $coupon, ...) — no implicit Request context needed.
The customer-facing preview endpoint accepts { code } in the request body — the endpoint controller resolves it via CouponRepository::findByCode($tenantId, $code) and does not need a Request macro.
